codeReview.summary: The fix directly addresses the prior failure: the 5 primary baselines are now sourced from igloo-paper dashboard artboard exports, the Playwright suite performs an explicit app-vs-paper comparison per state, the former app-generated baselines were retained and renamed to *-self.png as secondary checks, and the widened 0.20 parity threshold is documented with rationale in runtime-deviations.

sharedStateObservations.observation: ui-screen-worker procedure is UI-change centric; for this test-infrastructure-only remediation the worker had to deviate on both agent-browser and strict RED-first requirements. The deviation appears justified, but the skill could explicitly document a parity-baseline-remediation carve-out to reduce recurring false non-compliance signals.

summary: Pass: the original self-referential baseline flaw in m7-paper-parity-visuals is fixed by committing real Paper-source fixtures and making them the primary parity comparator, while preserving renamed self baselines as secondary regression guards.
